features.name: DCA engine — pure functions for dollar cost averaging
features.description: Create backend/app/portfolio/dca.py with: DCAConfig dataclass (max_levels, drop_trigger_pct, tranche_pcts), should_dca(current_price, entry_price, dca_level, config) -> bool, calculate_dca_buy(entry_price, quantity, buy_price, tranche_pct) -> dict. Pure Python, no DB.

features.name: Rich entry/exit decision context builder
features.description: Create backend/app/portfolio/decision_context.py: build_decision_context(indicators, recommendation, regime, protections_checked) -> dict with full signal breakdown. Pure function, returns dict with each indicator value and score component.

features.name: Multi-interval ingestion scheduler (4h + 1d)
features.description: Add 4h and 1d periodic ingestion loops to scheduler.py alongside existing 1h. Reuse existing _periodic_loop pattern. 4h runs every 4 hours, 1d runs every 24 hours.

features.name: Portfolio evaluation integration tests
features.description: Tests for full evaluate_portfolio flow: mock DB with positions, verify entry/exit decisions, protection checks, trailing updates work together. Test with realistic scenarios.

features.name: Scoring regression tests with known outcomes
features.description: Tests with hardcoded indicator values that should produce known recommendation types. Verify scoring is deterministic for specific market conditions (bullish RSI + MACD crossover = candidate_buy, etc).

features.name: Anomaly detector comprehensive tests
features.description: Tests for PriceSpikeDetector, VolumeSpikeDetector, RSIExtremeDetector, SqueezeDetector. Edge cases: empty data, single bar, at-threshold, extreme values.

features.name: Strategy Management View
features.description: New StrategyView.vue: table showing all 3 profiles with parameters, active profile highlighted, regime gauge (bullish/neutral/bearish color), auto-switch status, DCA/trailing config. Add to router + nav.

features.name: Signal breakdown in Recommendations View
features.description: Add expandable row per recommendation in RecommendationsView.vue showing 9-signal breakdown with color-coded horizontal bars (RSI, MACD, BB, ADX, StochRSI, price trend, volume, anomaly, volatility). Use signal_details from existing API.

features.name: Equity curve chart in Portfolio View
features.description: Add equity curve visualization using CSS bars in PortfolioView. Pull data from /portfolio/equity-curve endpoint. Show equity over time with drawdown overlay. No charting library — use inline CSS/SVG bars.

features.name: Backtest results equity chart
features.description: Enhance BacktestView.vue: add equity curve visualization from backtest results (CSS bars showing equity progression), trade markers (green=win, red=loss), MDD highlight zone.

features.name: Trade Journal View
features.description: New TradeJournalView.vue or section in PortfolioView: show completed trades with entry/exit signals, hold time, PnL, regime at trade. Pull from /portfolio/journal. Filterable by asset, date range.

features.name: Asset correlation matrix endpoint
features.description: Add GET /api/v1/analytics/correlations that calculates Pearson correlation between all monitored assets using last 30 days of 1h close prices. Returns matrix as dict of dicts. Useful for diversification analysis.

features.name: Asset comparison endpoint
features.description: Add GET /api/v1/analytics/compare?assets=BTC,ETH,AAPL returning side-by-side indicators, performance, anomalies for selected assets. Useful for watchlist analysis.

features.name: Portfolio rebalance suggestion
features.description: Add GET /api/v1/portfolio/rebalance-suggestion that analyzes current positions vs target allocation (equal weight or risk-weighted). Returns suggested buys/sells to rebalance. Pure calculation, no execution.

features.name: Market heatmap data endpoint
features.description: Add GET /api/v1/analytics/heatmap returning all assets with 24h change, volume change, anomaly status for heatmap visualization. Group by asset_class. Color-code by performance.

features.name: Market heatmap view in frontend
features.description: New component or section in DashboardView: grid of asset tiles colored by 24h performance (green=up, red=down, size=market cap). Shows all 40 monitored assets at a glance.
